title: Mini Wooden Pegs - 100pcs Mini Pegs for Decorative Photo Wall - 25mm Wooden Natural small Peg for Holding Photo Paper, Clothes,Crafts Display
features: Set of 100 mini pegs made of natural wood (L) 30 mm x (H) 25 mm. Use our mini clothes pegs with a string to hang up photos. Hanging accessories not included.

These small clips are ideal for craft and scrapbooking projects, twining, wedding card holders, appetisers, cocktails, drinks, gifts and photo projects. Perfect as a gift for creative DIY projects for children (aged 3+) and adults who love their small size. Also for art projects at school and for fun, either at school or at home.
They are very strong and durable, the metal nib is of high quality. You may need to reassemble a few times as the clip that holds them together comes loose in the pocket.
The mini wooden pegs can be disassembled and reassembled. -
They are made of natural wood, they are not varnished so they can easily be painted if necessary. There may be slight colour deviations from the illustrations.
